payload.last_assistant_message:
---

## Review Report: Remove Footer from Plans Page

### Executive Summary

The implementation correctly removes the `<footer>` element from the plans merch card shadow DOM, moves `<slot name="footer">` into the `.body` div to preserve CTA rendering, and cleans up all three footer-targeting CSS rules as specified. All acceptance criteria are met with no blockers. Two minor concerns were identified during review.

---

### Issues by Severity

#### Tech Debt — Latent null-pointer risk in `adjustSlotPlacement`

**Location**: `web-components/src/variants/plans.js:125`

```js
footer.prepend(slotInBodyClone);  // footer is null — not optional-chained
```

The spec stated "it does via optional chaining" regarding null safety in `adjustSlotPlacement`, but line 125 uses a bare `footer.prepend(...)` — **not** `footer?.prepend(...)`. With the footer element removed, `shadowRoot.querySelector('footer')` now returns `null`. If a plans card has `size='super-wide'`, is viewed on desktop (`Media.isDesktopOrUp === true`), and has an `addon` slot in the body, the `shouldBeInFooter && slotInBody` branch (line 119) executes and reaches line 125, throwing a TypeError.

**Recommended fix**: Change line 125 to `footer?.prepend(slotInBodyClone)` — or guard the entire `shouldBeInFooter` block behind a `if (footer)` check, since moving a slot to a non-existent footer is a no-op.

---

#### Skippable — Dead CSS rule for `.secure-transaction-label`

**Location**: `web-components/src/variants/plans.js:432–435`

```css
:host([variant='plans']) .secure-transaction-label {
    color: rgb(80, 80, 80);
    line-height: var(--consonant-merch-card-detail-xs-line-height);
}
```

With `secureLabelFooter` removed from `renderLayout()`, no `.secure-transaction-label` span is ever injected into plans cards' shadow DOM. This rule is now unreachable. The spec only required removing rules targeting `<footer>`, so this was appropriately left in scope — but it is orphaned CSS.

**Recommended fix**: Remove the `:host([variant='plans']) .secure-transaction-label` block from `variantStyle`.

---

### Plan Compliance

| Acceptance Criterion | Status |
|---|---|
| Plans card renders without `<footer>` in shadow DOM | ✅ `secureLabelFooter` removed from `renderLayout()` |
| CTAs (`slot="footer"`) still render inside `.body` div | ✅ `<slot name="footer">` added to `.body` |
| Secure transaction label no longer shown on plans cards | ✅ `secureLabelFooter` removed |
| No layout breakage — body padding and card structure intact | ✅ Only footer removed; `.body` div and its padding untouched |
| No unused CSS rules targeting `<footer>` remain in `variantStyle` | ✅ All three footer CSS rules removed |
| Other variants unaffected | ✅ Only `plans.js` modified |

**Syntax validation**: `node --check` passes cleanly.

---

### Verdict: PASS

No blockers. The implementation fully satisfies all spec acceptance criteria. One latent null-pointer risk (`footer.prepend`) in `adjustSlotPlacement` warrants a follow-up fix since the spec's safety claim was incorrect.

---
